subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the supreme guidance! A few bats, having nestled in the recesses of oblivion and enveloped in darkness [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بهدایت کبری خفاشانی چند که در زاویه نسیان خزیده بودند و در ظلمات
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God as sun, @justice and wrath of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
